title: Inserting values to a view with check option raises unexpected error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT);
INSERT INTO t3 (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', NULL);
CREATE VIEW v3 AS SELECT id, name FROM t3 WHERE age >= 18;
key_bug_features: Inserting values to a view with check option
